case_title: CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO A MUNICIPAL VS JOSEPH BRAND D/B COTTREL DENTAL CERAMICS

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $637.87 FILED BY CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO A MUNICIPAL CORPORATION, INVESTIGATION DIVISION ROOM 220 AS TO DEFENDANT JOSEPH BRAND D/B COTTREL DENTAL CERAMICS ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-21-1995 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT C

NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT TO JOSEPH BRAND COTTREL CERAMICS RETURNED FORWARDING ORDER EXPIRED.
